title: Oradea、Bihor — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Oradea、Bihorの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

OradeaはBihorにある人口196,367の都市です。A stunning Art Nouveau city near the Hungarian border, known for its beautifully restored Secessionist buildings, thermal springs, and vibrant café culture.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
